request.messages: [redacted: candidate evidence omitted from raw judge artifact]

message.reasoning_content:
We are asked to validate extracted ASHRAE Guideline 36 items. The candidates are given with candidate_id, knowledge_type, title, section_id, summary, evidence_quote, source_pages. We must output JSON with verdicts for each candidate. Accept if it is useful, grounded ASHRAE Guideline 36 operational knowledge. Reject if it is legal/front matter, TOC text, generic definitions without operational use, duplicated/noisy extraction, or summaries not supported by evidence. allowed category_if_not values: null, front_matter, toc, generic_definition, unsupported, duplicate, other.

We'll go through each candidate:

1. cand_f403bd614af49278: "Supply fan shall run in Cooldown, Setup, or Occupied modes" - This is an operational sequence rule. Evidence quote matches. Grounded. Accept.

2. cand_d37c30ffe900d70a: "Supply fan shall run with perimeter VAV-reheat in Setback/Warmup" - Also operational. Evidence: "If there are any VAV-reheat boxes on perimeter zones, supply fan shall also run when system is in Setback Mode or Warmup Mode (i.e., all modes except unoccupied)." Grounded. Accept.

3. cand_494359f0d38e5a7f: "Totalize VAV box airflow to Vps" - Operational: sum airflow to software point Vps. Evidence: "Totalize current airflow rate from VAV boxes to a software point Vps." Accept.

4. cand_f4b4ac557ac9de82: "Static pressure setpoint reset T&R parameters" - Parameter spec. Evidence from Table 5.16.1.2. Accept.

5. cand_ce3fa8dec5e6add0: "SAT control loop enable/disable" - Operational. Evidence: "Control loop is enabled when the supply air fan is proven ON, and disabled and output set to deadband otherwise." Accept.

6. cand_e46745155631bf00: "Occupied/Setup SAT setpoint reset with OAT" - Operational. Evidence about reset during Occupied/Setup. Accept.

7. cand_bbda848c9a463981: "Cooldown SAT setpoint" - Operational. "During Cooldown Mode, setpoint shall be Min_ClgSAT." Accept.

8. cand_550b3622e2d7803b: "Warmup and Setback SAT setpoint" - Operational. "During Warmup Mode and Setback Mode, setpoint shall be 35°C (95°F)." Accept.

9. cand_b24e54fdbdbf998d: "SAT control loop output mapping to coil and damper sequencing" - Operational. "Supply air temperature shall be controlled to setpoint using a control loop whose output is mapped to sequence the heating coil, outdoor air damper, return air damper, and cooling coil." Accept.

10. cand_f1d2101a790efb6d: "Return fan MaxRA-P modulated for minimum OA" - Operational. Evidence: "Return air damper maximum position MaxRA-P is modulated to control minimum outdoor air volume." Accept.

11. cand_44a1ffb4ea8006ce: "Relief damper/fan MinOA-P and/or MaxRA-P modulation for min OA" - Operational. Evidence covers economizer damper minimum position MinOA-P and/or return air damper maximum position MaxRA-P modulated. Accept.

12. cand_a0a3b367d7eab616: "Separate min OA damper: economizer damper MinOA-P = 0%" - Operational. Evidence: "For units with a separate minimum outdoor air damper, economizer damper minimum position MinOA-P is 0%, and return air damper maximum position MaxRA-P is modulated..." Accept.

13. cand_72b60abcf2783f9a: "Single common damper: MaxRA-P and MinOA-P modulated" - Operational. Evidence: "For units with a single common minimum outdoor air and economizer damper, return air damper maximum position MaxRA-P and economizer damper minimum position MinOA-P are modulated..." Accept.

14. cand_e6dc377328239364: "AbsMinOA* calculation for Title 24" - Operational calculation. Evidence: "AbsMinOA* is the sum of Zone-Abs-OA-min for all zones ... limited to AbsMinOA." Accept.

15. cand_f9cdcee1c31f5926: "DesMinOA* calculation for Title 24" - Operational calculation. Evidence: "DesMinOA* is the sum of Zone-Des-OA-min ... limited to DesMinOA." Accept.

16. cand_14d0f0d2b6361260: "AbsDPsp* and DesDPsp* calculations for Title 24" - Operational. Evidence gives formulas. Possibly slightly garbled but grounded. Accept.

17. cand_6a20ec2a17151553: "MinDPsp reset based on zone CO2 (Title 24)" - Operational. Evidence: reset based on highest zone CO2 control-loop signal. Accept.

18. cand_baa831e7bf5ba7cb: "MinOAsp reset based on zone CO2 (Title 24)" - Operational. Evidence: reset based on highest zone CO2 control-loop signal. Accept.

19. cand_9add69109985712e: "Open minimum outdoor air damper when fan ON and Occupied and MinDPsp>0" - Operational. Evidence matches. Accept.

20. cand_6d219e1c15adab46: "Minimum OA control enable conditions for return fans (DP)" - Operational. Evidence gives conditions. Accept.

21. cand_604e0e2f2f5c3aa5: "Minimum OA control disable conditions for return fans (DP)" - Operational. Evidence gives conditions. Accept.

22. cand_c9f78df24cd87212: "Return fan: Disabled sequence restores economizer damper" - Operational. Evidence details. Accept.

23. cand_c2ffd5e87632557a: "Return fan MRA-P calculation" - Operational. Evidence: scaling from 95% to 20%, set to 100% when not calculated. Accept.

24. cand_0fd2a5def642353c: "Relief dampers enable with supply fan" - Operational. Evidence: "Relief dampers shall be enabled when the associated supply fan is proven ON, and disabled otherwise." Accept.

25. cand_a84a8a80fae6c65a: "Relief dampers building pressure control" - Operational. Evidence: P-only loop to maintain 12 Pa, close when disabled. Accept.

26. cand_43d4e4333e0f9007: "Building static pressure time averaging for relief fans" - Operational. Evidence: time averaging with 5-min window, 15-s sampling, highest averaged sensor. Accept.

27. cand_bcf2716603136216: "Relief fan control loop (P-only)" - Operational. Evidence: "A single P-only control loop for each pressure zone shall maintains the building pressure at a" - incomplete but likely grounds control. Accept.

28. cand_3b9dac69dc17e38a: "Relief fan staging logic" - Operational. Evidence: staging logic described. Accept.

29. cand_826018f1835ebeb3: "Return fan direct building pressure control sequence" - Operational. Evidence: P-only loop to maintain 12 Pa, sequence exhaust dampers and return fan setpoint. Accept.

30. cand_0ddf52fd1fa858b7: "Return fan airflow tracking S-R-DIFF* calculation" - Operational. Evidence: formula given. Accept.

31. cand_5d804863f3f93c62: "Supply fan airflow limit in airflow tracking" - Operational. Evidence: reverse-acting P-only loop with setpoint. Accept.

32. cand_ed7e1ac3cc5b6da8: "Freeze protection stage 1" - Operational. Evidence: actions on low SAT. Accept.

33. cand_f817d5e99e8645c2: "Freeze protection stage 2" - Operational. Evidence: actions on lower SAT. Accept.

34. cand_913a758e20a04133: "Freeze protection stage 3" - Operational. Evidence: actions on freeze-stat or very low SAT. Accept.

All candidates appear to be valid operational knowledge or parameter specs from ASHRAE Guideline 36, with evidence quotes supporting them. None seem to be front matter, TOC, generic definitions without operational use, duplicates, or unsupported summaries.

Thus, all verdicts: is_valid_guideline36_knowledge: true, reason: short reason (e.g., "Operational rule from ASHRAE Guideline 36"), category_if_not: null.

We'll produce JSON with verdicts for each candidate_id.
